---
title: "plots for paper"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Caithness General Hospital Naive Approach - Fig 1

```{r plot1}
plot_auto_SPC(testo, x = Month_Start, y = daily_ave_att, x_break = 28, override_date_format = "%d/%m/%y", use_caption = FALSE, includeAnnotations = FALSE, override_x_title = "Date", override_y_title = "Attendances", title = "Average daily A&E attendances per week", subtitle = "Caithness General Hospital")
```
